notes: C: keeps code, tests, workflow state, and shallow index JSON.
F: stores new selected-topic deep-dive, CardNews media, and rendered artifacts.
Existing C: data is not moved or deleted by this configuration.
Ad images are not stored; ad text/domain/category signals are enough for V1.
Credentials, login sessions, and publish actions are never stored here.

2026-07-20: graphify-out migrated to F:/AI-Content-OS-Data/graphify-out; the repository graphify-out is now a directory junction to F:, so any direct `graphify` CLI invocation (hook-guard, `graphify update .`, etc.) transparently reads/writes F: with no per-caller wiring needed.
